groups.name: imld.cloud-bridge
groups.description: Private deployment outbound bridge capability settings.

properties.name: imld.deployment.mode
properties.description: Deployment mode identifier.

properties.name: imld.cloud-bridge.enabled
properties.description: Enables outbound cloud bridge capability.

properties.name: imld.cloud-bridge.scenario-allowlist
properties.description: Business scenarios allowed to trigger cloud communication.

properties.name: imld.cloud-bridge.network.egress-allowlist
properties.description: Allowed outbound endpoints in host:port format.

properties.name: imld.cloud-bridge.security.tls-required
properties.description: Requires TLS for cloud bridge transport.

properties.name: imld.cloud-bridge.security.mtls-required
properties.description: Requires mTLS for cloud bridge transport.

properties.name: imld.cloud-bridge.security.request-signature-required
properties.description: Enforces request signing for outbound bridge traffic.

properties.name: imld.cloud-bridge.security.replay-protection-enabled
properties.description: Enables replay attack protection.

properties.name: imld.privacy.data-egress.minimum-necessary-enabled
properties.description: Only minimum necessary data may leave private deployment.

properties.name: imld.privacy.data-egress.deidentification-required
properties.description: Requires de-identification before outbound synchronization.

properties.name: imld.privacy.data-egress.deny-raw-phi-egress
properties.description: Blocks raw PHI from leaving private deployment.

properties.name: imld.integration.transport
properties.description: Integration transport type.

properties.name: imld.integration.outbound-only-default
properties.description: Whether integration defaults to outbound-only communication.

properties.name: imld.integration.contract-version
properties.description: Version of integration contract.

properties.name: imld.security.data-encryption-key
properties.description: AES key used for sensitive data encryption/decryption; must be at least 16 bytes when enabled.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.enabled
properties.description: Enable Java-native IMLD inference APIs.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.desensitized-clinical-enabled
properties.description: Enable desensitized clinical feature fuzzification during inference.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.model-file-path
properties.description: Path to Java-loadable XGBoost model file.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.metadata-file-path
properties.description: Path to model metadata JSON file.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.model-version-fallback
properties.description: Fallback model version when metadata is unavailable.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.engine
properties.description: Inference engine label exposed by health endpoint.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.max-batch-size
properties.description: Maximum records allowed in a single batch inference request.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.low-risk-threshold
properties.description: Low risk upper threshold.

properties.name: imld.inference.imld.high-risk-threshold
properties.description: High risk lower threshold.
